element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational movement for all subsequent levels
Enables vertical navigation and access to higher areas
Required for reaching elevated platforms and secrets
Spatial shortcuts and alternative navigation routes
Alternative enemy elimination and object destruction tool
Resource management; sustains health meter through level
Traversal mechanic enabling horizontal and vertical movement over hazards
Optional collectibles; provide hints and bonus scoring
Defensive power-up for bypassing dangerous sections
Secret collectibles that permanently expand health meter to 5 units
Immediate-death environmental hazard requiring precise platforming
Collectible gate for optional bonus level access after each main level
Boss/narrative trigger that concludes episode and swallows Cosmo
New thematic context; gameplay mechanics remain consistent
Final thematic environment with increased difficulty

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platform reached after hazard crossing
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate pacing with alternating challenge-and-recovery cycles; safe space (flat platforms with pickups) interrupted by hazard sequences (enemy gauntlets, complex jumping puzzles); three-episode structure allows cumulative difficulty escalation with environmental and enemy variety increasing per episode

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Vertical exploration with wall-hanging and springs reveals hidden cheeseburgers and bonus level gates; upper and lower screen routes provide optional collectible paths
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Cheeseburgers hidden in non-obvious locations (suggested by pickup convention); hint globes mark areas of interest and hint at hidden mechanics

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (walking, jumping, wall-hanging) in safe environments with minimal enemy pressure; basic single-enemy encounters; simple platforming sequences
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Combination of multiple mechanics required simultaneously (jumping + wall-hanging + bomb usage); increased enemy density; introduction of projectile-firing enemies; more complex environmental hazards; teleporter-based puzzles
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex multi-stage platforming requiring precise execution; high enemy density with coordinated attack patterns; hovercraft navigation challenges; reduced health pickups; cumulative mastery of all mechanics required

notable_level_patterns.description: Level begins with a clear space to collect health and orient; followed by a constrained section filled with enemies, projectiles, and/or platforming challenges that demands health management and accumulated skill
Level primarily requires upward movement via wall-hanging, springs, or hovercraft; challenges increase with height; rewards (cheeseburgers, stars) placed at high-altitude locations
Level provides upper and lower paths; upper path is more hazardous but yields collectibles; lower path is safer but may be blocked by pushable button mechanics requiring exploration
Episode-ending level culminates in large creature encounter (Episode 1 end, Episode 2 end); serves as narrative transition and climactic difficulty spike
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Episode 1 Level 10, Episode 2 Level 10, Episode 3 Level 10

notable_level_patterns.description: Main level concludes with star collection visible; bonus levels accessible if sufficient stars gathered; creates secondary goal-tree outside critical path

sources_used: wikipedia: Cosmo's Cosmic Adventure (gameplay section, plot section, development section)
